The '''jimvu''' was an agile, six-legged, ungulate-like [[Reptile/Legends|reptile]] whose only defense was its swiftness. Their main predators were the [[Veermok/Legends|veermok]] and [[Narglatch/Legends|narglatch]]. They lived in the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

{{Creature-stub}}
